title: cymbochasma borysthenica
intro: Cymbochasma borysthenica, also known as Borysthenica, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family of Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cymbochasma borysthenica include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Cymbochasma borysthenica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
